# What's My Rising

> Free rising sign and astrological big three calculator at https://whatsmyrising.com

## What it does

Calculates a person's astrological Ascendant (rising sign), Sun sign, Moon sign, and all planetary placements from their birth date, time, and city. Uses the whole-sign house system, the oldest known house system in Western astrology.

## Key concepts

- **Rising sign / Ascendant**: the zodiac sign that was rising on the eastern horizon at the exact moment and location of your birth. It changes every ~2 hours, which is why birth time matters.
- **Big three**: the three most personal points in a birth chart — Sun (your core identity), Moon (your emotional nature), and Ascendant (how others perceive you).
- **Whole sign houses**: a house system where each of the 12 houses corresponds exactly to one zodiac sign, beginning with the Ascendant sign as the first house. Used by Hellenistic astrologers since antiquity.

## How to use

Enter birth city, date, and time. The tool geocodes the city, looks up the historical UTC offset, and computes all planetary positions using the Astronomy Engine library. No sign-up required. Free.

## Author

Made by Jurgis — astrologer and designer based in Vilnius. Astrological consultations available at https://jurgis.info/astrology
